label: Intent Identification
description: The response correctly identifies the user's core intent (e.g., billing dispute, account access, product question) before attempting to resolve it.
pass_example: It sounds like you're having trouble with a duplicate charge on your account. Let me look into that for you.
fail_example: Sure, I can help you with that! Please tell me more about your issue.

label: No Hallucination
description: The response does not invent policy details, pricing, feature availability, or account-specific information that was not provided in the context.
pass_example: I don't have access to your account details here, but our billing team can confirm any charges by contacting support@example.com.
fail_example: Your refund of $49.99 has already been processed and should appear in 3-5 business days.

label: Specific Next Action
description: The response gives the user a clear, concrete next step rather than a vague suggestion.
pass_example: Please visit account.example.com/reset-password and enter your registered email to receive a reset link.
fail_example: You should try resetting your password or contacting support if that doesn't work.

label: Under 80 Words
description: The response body is 80 words or fewer, keeping answers concise and scannable for the user.
pass_example: Your subscription renews on the 1st of each month. To cancel, go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Plan. Changes take effect at the end of the current billing cycle.
fail_example: Thank you so much for reaching out to us today! We really appreciate your patience and are so glad you contacted support. Let me walk you through every possible option available to you in great detail, starting from the very beginning of the process...

label: Honest Refusal of Impossible Requests
description: When the user requests something outside the bot's capability or policy (e.g., immediate refunds, account deletion mid-session), the response honestly declines rather than making false promises.
pass_example: I'm not able to process refunds directly in this chat. I can open a ticket for our billing team, who will review your request within 2 business days.
fail_example: No problem! I'll go ahead and issue your refund right now and delete your account as requested.
